ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ui_elements" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each UI element */,
  "element_name" TEXT /* Name of the UI element */,
  "element_type" INTEGER /* Type of the UI element (e.g., Button, Icon, Navigation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the UI element */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the element was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the element was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the element */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the element */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the element belongs to */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the element is in */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the UI element */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL to a thumbnail image of the element */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated tags for categorization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ui_elements_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ui_elements_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ui_elements_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES element_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ui_elements_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES element_states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ui_elements_element_type FOREIGN KEY ("element_type") REFERENCES element_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "element_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each element type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the element type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the element type */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to an icon representing the element type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "element_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for nested categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "element_states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the state */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Hex code to visually represent the state in the UI */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "element_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UI element */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project where the element is used */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the element has been used in the project */,
  "last_used_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last usage of the element in the project */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Deployment environment (e.g., dev, staging, production) */,
  "feedback_score" REAL /* Average user feedback score for the element in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_element_usage_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES ui_elements ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_element_usage_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team working on the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, designer, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON field to store specific permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "element_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UI element */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the variant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the variant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the variant was last updated */,
  "variant_properties" TEXT /* JSON field to store additional properties of the variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_element_variants_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES ui_elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "element_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UI element */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "is_sensitive" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the metadata is sensitive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_element_metadata_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES ui_elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "element_relations" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relation */,
  "parent_element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent element */,
  "child_element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child element */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of the relation (e.g., nested, grouped) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Integer to indicate the order or priority of the relation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_element_relations_child_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_element_id") REFERENCES ui_elements ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_element_relations_parent_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_element_id") REFERENCES ui_elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UI element */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the element */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the accessing device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES ui_elements ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
